docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF M. TODISCO IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGEMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION (TRANSACTION ID # 79510643) FILED BY PLAINTIFF POCKET ENTERTAINMENT SERVICES LLC
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-24-26 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF POCKET ENTERTAINMENT SERVICES LLC'S APPLICATION FOR A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION.***(AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S NOTES/TRANSCRIPT) JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, REPORTED. (302/JMQ) ***AFTER THE HEARING, THE COURT SIGNS AN ORDER.
